no: Overhauls the Bhaalspawn Slayer transformation with new abilities, visual effects, and progression tied to Hell Trial choices. Makes the Slayer form a viable tactical option rather than a liability.
sum: Overhauls the Bhaalspawn Slayer transformation with new abilities, visual effects, and progression. Makes the Slayer form a viable tactical choice rather than a liability.

co.no: Overhauls Bhaalspawn powers with revised abilities.
good & evil characters share the same powers set, the 2nd alignment set is unfinished, but all works and thematically fits any bhaalspawn

co.n: Revised Pocket Plane Bonuses for Ascension mod (requires Revised Slayer Change)
co.no: don't try to mix with Ding0 Questpack's Hell Rewards, even if it still works for EE
